Video.summary: Watch this video tutorial to learn how to make a colorful Felt Flower Corsage Craft. Adding a chic and cute DIY corsage to your event can really make your quirky and crafty nature stand out. This craft tutorial shows you how to create felt flowers and combine then with a pipe cleaner to make a charming DIY corsage. This felt craft idea would be a fantastic wearable craft to make for bridal shower guests or the flower girl at your wedding.
Video.title: FaveCrafts: Felt Flower Corsage Craft

Image.alt: FaveCrafts: Felt Flower Corsage Craft
FaveCrafts: Felt Flower Corsage Craft

Video.summary: "Learn how to make a Potted Faux Flower Craft as a DIY centerpiece for springtime, bridal showers, baby showers, and more! This video tutorial shows you how to make a faux flower as well as a vase for your brand new bloom. This easy die cut craft is perfect for spring decorating, and unlike real plants, this flower craft is low maintenance and can go anywhere in your home! Be sure to watch this DIY craft tutorial for a spring craft idea you'll love. "
Video.title: FaveCrafts: Potted Faux Flower Craft

Image.alt: FaveCrafts: Potted Faux Flower Craft
FaveCrafts: Potted Faux Flower Craft

Video.summary: What's up guys! for this Frog food we are going to learn how to draw hands! Thats right, it's a tutorial! You asked for it, and I delivered. Well, to the best of my abilities. I am by no means an expert but I am happy to show you all how I learned.

Video.summary: This Adorable Flower Pencil Toppers is such a quick and cute craft that is perfect for the back to school season. Make your pencils stand out this year, or just brighten up your day by creating these tissue paper flowers. Everyone is going to love your DIY paper flowers and ask how you made your pencils. Whether you are decorating gel pencils or just regular #2 pencils, these die cut flowers are guaranteed to add a fun and pretty touch to your school supplies!
Video.title: FaveCrafts: Adorable Flower Pencil Toppers

Image.alt: FaveCrafts: Adorable Flower Pencil Toppers
FaveCrafts: Adorable Flower Pencil Toppers

Video.summary: This cute Candy Drawer DIY Party Favor is an excellent, customizable DIY favor for just about any occasion. Fill the tiny drawer with candy and leave them on tables as a DIY wedding favor, or fill them with kind notes and hand out to your friends the next time you host girls' night. No matter what you use it for, this free paper craft idea is a great little project! Check out this video tutorial to learn how to make them.
Video.title: FaveCrafts: Candy Drawer DIY Party Favor

Image.alt: FaveCrafts: Candy Drawer DIY Party Favor
FaveCrafts: Candy Drawer DIY Party Favor

Video.summary: Jane crashes the craft rooms of America's most talented and creative makers. In this episode, Jane meets a "picker" to make a one-of-a-kind piece of art.

Image.alt: Craft Room Crash: Making All Things Beautiful - Vintage Window
Craft Room Crash: Making All Things Beautiful - Vintage Window

Video.summary: Beth is a busy, successful, single executive whose life consists of five-star hotels, gourmet restaurants and VIP airport lounges. But her own house, a midtown Toronto duplex, doesn't measure up. As a result, she feels more at home on the road than in her own house. Designer Samantha Pynn uses silks, metallic wallpaper, glass tabletops and mirrored doors to transform Beth's dowdy living quarters into a glamorous and luxurious space.
Video.title: Pure Design: Beth's Dining Room

Image.alt: Pure Design: Beth's Dining Room
Pure Design: Beth's Dining Room

Video.summary: This is the PERFECT portable set for Doll Photography PLUS it is a great addition to any Dollhouse! Check out How to Make a Doll Camp Site LUS Storage!
Video.title: My Froggy Stuff: How to Make Doll Camp Site Perfect for Portable Doll Photography

Image.alt: My Froggy Stuff: How to Make Doll Camp Site Perfect for Portable Doll Photography
My Froggy Stuff: How to Make Doll Camp Site Perfect for Portable Doll Photography

Video.summary: Homeowners Helen and Niall are getting nervous - they're a few short months away from the birth of their first child and their never-renovated 1920s home doesn't contain a nursery. Both work full time - so they're relying on designer Samantha Pynn to create a bright and practical room for their new bundle of joy.
Video.title: Pure Design: Helen & Niall's Nursery

Image.alt: Pure Design: Helen & Niall's Nursery
Pure Design: Helen & Niall's Nursery
